name: Security Gate — srg-vulnerable-app
description: Blocks deployments when Dynatrace Application Security detects critical or high-severity vulnerabilities in the srg-vulnerable-app service.

objectives.name: No Critical Vulnerabilities
objectives.description: Fails if ANY critical (CVSS ≥ 9.0) vulnerability is open. With the demo app, node-serialize@0.0.4 (CVE-2017-5941) and ejs@3.1.6 (CVE-2022-29078) both score 9.8.
objectives.dqlQuery: fetch security_problems | filter status == "OPEN" and riskLevel == "CRITICAL" | count

objectives.name: High Vulnerabilities < 3
objectives.description: Warns if 1-2 high-severity vulnerabilities are open; fails if 3 or more. lodash@4.17.15 (CVE-2020-8203) and axios@0.21.1 (CVE-2021-3749) are both HIGH.
objectives.dqlQuery: fetch security_problems | filter status == "OPEN" and riskLevel == "HIGH" | count
